issue.title: [Security] Renderer process can call oRPC procedures directly via window.__ORPC__
issue.body:
When running the desktop app, opening DevTools and typing `window.__ORPC__` exposes the entire oRPC client. While the IPC bridge in `apps/desktop/src/preload/index.ts` is the documented path, the client is also accidentally attached to `window` because of a stray `Object.assign(window, { __ORPC__: client })` in `apps/desktop/electron.vite.config.ts` during dev.

This bypasses the preload IPC contract.

expected.rationale: Security boundary bypass — stop everything and fix
